permalink: /content/en/llms.txt
---

# Glorantha Perspectives

> Diegetic resources for exploring the Glorantha role-playing universe: rules, reflections, and gameplay tools aligning gameplay and roleplay.

## Rules

- [Rules](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/): Overview of diegetic rules
- [Animism](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/animism/): The spirit world
- [Spirit bag](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/animism/spirit-bag/): Alternative bids with a bag of stones
- [Shamanic aptitudes](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/animism/aptitudes/): Spirit rune aptitudes
- [Theism](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/theism/): Pantheons and cults
- [Runic cards](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/theism/runic-cards/): Bids with a runic card deck
- [Invisible God Logic](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/logic/): Rational worldview
- [Mysticism](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/mysticism/): Deconstructing the illusion of reality
- [Mystical marbles](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/mysticism/mystical-marbles/): Tool for mystics
- [Draconic thought](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/draconic/): The Dragon's Dream
- [Ars Draconis Magica](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/draconic/ars-draconis-magica/): Draconic magic grimoire
- [The Lunar Way](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/moon/): Lunar magic and lunar cycle
- [Illumination](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/illumination/): Mystical oppression and question duels
- [Heroquests](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/heroquests/): Accessing the Other Side
- [Creating myths](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/heroquests/myths/): Tales from the Age of Gods
- [Runic inspiration](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/runes/inspiration/): Runes weave reality
- [Camps & Bids](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/mises/): Gathering strength in the invisible
- [Bid example](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/mises/sample/): Concrete illustration of an opposition
- [Play modes](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/rules/games/): Solo and Glorantha exploration

## Optional

- [Notes](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/): Diverse notes on Glorantha
- [Multiple thought frameworks](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/multiple-referentials/): Syncretism between frameworks
- [Chaos](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/chaos/): Reflections on Chaos
- [New frameworks](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/new-referentials/): Creating a new thought framework
- [On inspiration](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/inspiration/): Sources of inspiration for Glorantha
- [Statistics](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/stats/): Rule statistics
- [Reflections on bids](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/mises/): Bids and multiple frameworks
- [Rune meditation](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/runes-meditation/): Order of power runes
- [Gloranthan themes](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/themas/): Hero Wars themes
- [Yet Another Glorantha](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/yet-another-glorantha/): Moving away from canon
- [Runic colors](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/runic-colors/): Color and strong rune
- [Runic forms](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/runic-forms/): Formalizing runes
- [Currency](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/money/): Currencies in Glorantha
- [Random calendar](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/random-calendar/): Drawing a calendar day
- [Glorantha for newbies](https://aleascript.github.io/glorantha-perspectives/content/en/notes/gloranthix/): World introduction for new players
